problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE annex is in thread implementation scope but references port names that are not visible in that scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the AGREE annex from MAGNETO.IMPL to MAGNETO

executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from thread implementation MAGNETO.IMPL
Add the annex agree block to thread type MAGNETO
Ensure all referenced identifiers (mag_in_data_x, mag_in_data_y, mag_in_data_z, mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, mag_out_data_z) are properly scoped in the new location
